description: Combine static, AST, path, tool, and (optionally) AI review findings into exactly one of `read-only`, `benign-write`, `risky-write`, `blocked`, `unknown`. AI review can only escalate; it cannot lower a static block. Multi-command scripts take the highest risk of any contained command (saf-02).
notes: Keep the precedence rule trivially enumerable; document it in `docs/SAFETY.md`.
steps: TDD: Bounded `pandoc` write inside safe root returns `benign-write`.
TDD: AI review escalates `benign-write` to `risky-write` or `blocked`.
TDD: AI review cannot lower `blocked` to `risky-write`.
Author `Private/Safety/Resolve-RiskClassification.ps1` with deterministic precedence: blocked > risky-write > benign-write > read-only; unknown short-circuits.
name: [saf-06] Combined risk classification
